# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd authz missing and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: auth-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-metrics-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-payment
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: payment-service-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: auth-service-sa
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scrape-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-metrics-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: prometheus
        namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: microservices
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mtls-only
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-only
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*"
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: frontend-sa
      namespace: microservices
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: backend-sa
      namespace: microservices
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: database-sa
      namespace: microservices
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: auth-service-sa
      namespace: microservices
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payment-service-sa
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: backend-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: "/api/v1/users"
            type: PathPrefix
        - path:
            value: "/api/v1/orders"
            type: PathPrefix
      backendRefs:
        - name: backend
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: health-check-allow
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: backend
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      except:
        - cidr: 10.0.1.0/24
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
